---
title: "Example Progress Update"
date: "2024-01-15"
description: "An example progress entry showing figures and analysis."
---

## Summary

Brief summary of what was accomplished this period.

## Figures

Figures saved to `reports/figures/` are accessible via the `figures/` symlink
at the Quarto project root. Reference them with paths relative to this file:

```markdown
![Caption](../figures/my-plot.png)
```

Or generate them inline using code chunks:

```{{r}}
#| label: fig-example
#| fig-cap: "Example figure caption"
# plot(x, y)
```

```{{python}}
#| label: fig-example
#| fig-cap: "Example figure caption"
# import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
# plt.plot(x, y)
```

## Next Steps

- Item one
- Item two
